corpus.title: Report: Pacific Minerals Corp Quarterly Update
corpus.snippet: Pacific Minerals Corp reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectatio...
corpus.content: Pacific Minerals Corp reported quarterly results in line with analyst expectations. Revenue of $462M was up 5.1% year-over-year. CEO remarked conditions remain favourable heading into the next quarter.
